name: mbstrncmp, mbstrncmp_off
title: mbstrncmp, mbstrncmp_off
syntax: long mbstrncmp(char s1[], char s2[], long len); // form 1
long mbstrncmp(char s1[], char s2[], long s2offset, long len); // form 2
long mbstrncmp_off(char s1[], long s1offset, char s2[], long s2offset, long len); // form 3
description: This function compares s1 with s2 for a maximum of len characters.
If they are identical the functional result is 0. If s1 is less than s2 the result is -1, else +1.
Comparison starts in s1 at s1offset (form 3) and in s2 at s2offset (form 2 and form 3).

parameters.name: len
parameters.description: Maximum number of characters to compare

example.code:
char s[50] = "'Tür' is the german word for 'door'.";
write("%d", mbstrncmp_off(s, 13, "german", 0, 6)); // 0

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
